title: equisetum hyemale subsp. moorei
intro: Equisetum hyemale subsp. moorei, also known as scouring rush, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Equisetaceae family and is native to Australia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of compounds like flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Equisetum hyemale subsp. moorei include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant activity. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used as a decoction or infusion, often combined with other herbs, to create teas or tinctures that can be used to support overall health and well-being.
